dashboard.label: VulnSentinel: Autonomous Security Agent
dashboard.description: Agentic Vulnerability Discovery, Deterministic Risk Engine, & Remediation Architecture

search.query: index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host | search host=* | stats count as cves dc(host) as assets | eval summary="VulnSentinel has mapped " + cves + " active CISA KEV threats directly exposing " + assets + " critical internal assets. Autonomous remediation workflows have been queued." | fields summary

index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, is_internet_facing, business_criticality, known_exploitation | search host=* | fillnull value="N/A" cve_id is_internet_facing business_criticality known_exploitation | eval cvss_score = coalesce(cvss_score, 7.5) | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(is_internet_facing=="True", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(business_criticality=="High", 20, business_criticality=="Medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(known_exploitation=="True", 10, 0) | eval initial_risk = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | lookup vulnsentinel:audit target_host AS host OUTPUT status as audit_status | eval mitigated_risk = if(like(audit_status, "SUCCESS%"), (coalesce(cvss_score, 7.5) * 5 * 0.4), initial_risk) | stats sum(initial_risk) as gross_risk, sum(mitigated_risk) as net_risk | eval reduction_pct = round(((gross_risk - net_risk) / gross_risk) * 100, 1) | fields reduction_pct
index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:audit" action="execute_autonomous_remediation" status="SUCCESS*" | stats count

panel.title: Agentic Security Operations Matrix (Powered by Foundation-Sec-1.1-8B)

search.query: index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, ip_address, is_internet_facing, business_criticality | search host=* | head 4 | fillnull value="N/A" cve_id vulnerability_name vendor_project product host ip_address is_internet_facing business_criticality reference_url known_exploitation | eval cvss_score = coalesce(cvss_score, 7.5) | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(is_internet_facing=="True", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(business_criticality=="High", 20, business_criticality=="Medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(known_exploitation=="True", 10, 0) | eval risk_score = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | ai prompt="Classify this vulnerability: {cve_id} ({vulnerability_name}). Map it directly to one primary MITRE ATT&CK Initial Access or Execution technique category (e.g., T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application). Respond with ONLY the ID and Name, nothing else." | rename ai_result_1 as mitre_mapping | ai prompt="You are an expert security AI. We detected a new vulnerability: {cve_id} ({vulnerability_name}) affecting {vendor_project} {product}. Splunk asset mapping shows this software is running on our host '{host}' (IP: {ip_address}, Internet Facing: {is_internet_facing}, Criticality: {business_criticality}). Generate a strict JSON Action Plan containing exactly three keys: 'host', 'recommended_action', and 'urgency' (either URGENT, HIGH, or MEDIUM). Output ONLY valid JSON. Do not use markdown blocks." | eval ai_result_1=replace(ai_result_1, "```json\s*", "") | eval ai_result_1=replace(ai_result_1, "```\s*", "") | rex field=ai_result_1 "(?s)(?<action_plan>\{.*\})" | spath input=action_plan | eval reference_url=if(reference_url=="N/A", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/"+cve_id, reference_url) | table _time, cve_id, host, mitre_mapping, risk_score, recommended_action, urgency, reference_url | rename _time as "Detection Time", cve_id as "CVE ID", host as "Target Asset", mitre_mapping as "MITRE TTP", risk_score as "Risk Index", recommended_action as "Agent Remediation Plan", urgency as "Priority SLA", reference_url as "Threat Intel"

index="main" sourcetype="vulnsentinel:cve" | lookup asset_inventory vendor AS vendor_project OUTPUT host, is_internet_facing, business_criticality, known_exploitation | search host=* | eval cvss_score = coalesce(cvss_score, 7.5) | eval cvss_points = cvss_score * 5 | eval exposure_points = if(is_internet_facing=="True", 20, 0) | eval criticality_points = case(business_criticality=="High", 20, business_criticality=="Medium", 10, 1==1, 0) | eval exploitation_points = if(known_exploitation=="True", 10, 0) | eval risk_score = coalesce(cvss_points, 0) + coalesce(exposure_points, 0) + coalesce(criticality_points, 0) + coalesce(exploitation_points, 0) | timechart span=1h max(risk_score) as "Peak Asset Exposure Risk"
